app.description: convert scholarly metadata to a variety of formats
bibliography.title: Bibliography
docs.formats.title: Supported Metadata Formats
docs.usage.title: DOI Resolution
docs.doi_resolution.intro: Redirect a DOI to the URL registered for it. Either click the link in the bibliography or send a DOI as the URL path to the server:
docs.content_negotiation.title: Content Negotiation
docs.content_negotiation.intro: Get metadata in a specific format by either clicking the export or copy links at the bottom of the bibliography, or sending a DOI as the URL path to the server together with an Accept header or using the ?format= query parameter. The server will respond with the requested format if supported, or redirect to the URL registered for it if not.
docs.content_negotiation.bibtex_label: Example — fetch BibTeX for a PLOS Computational Biology article:
docs.content_negotiation.citation_style_: For formatted citations, pass the citation style and locale via the Accept header (style defaults to apa, locale to en-US):
docs.content_negotiation.multiple_types_: Multiple content types with q= weights are supported per RFC 7231:
